sentences.arabic: الطَّعَامُ الصِّحِّيُّ هُوَ أَسَاسُ الْجِسْمِ الْقَوِيِّ وَالْعَقْلِ السَّلِيمِ.
sentences.translation: Zdrava hrana je osnova jakog tijela i zdravog uma.
sentences.translationEn: Healthy food is the foundation of a strong body and a sound mind.

sentences.arabic: نَحْنُ نَحْتَاجُ إِلَى تَنَاوُلِ الْخَضْرَاوَاتِ وَالْفَوَاكِهِ بِاسْتِمْرَارٍ.
sentences.translation: Trebamo stalno jesti povrće i voće.
sentences.translationEn: We need to eat vegetables and fruits constantly.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الْأَطْعِمَةُ تَمْنَحُنَا الْفِيتَامِينَاتِ اللَّازِمَةَ لِلنُّمُوِّ.
sentences.translation: Ove namirnice nam daju vitamine potrebne za rast.
sentences.translationEn: These foods provide us with the vitamins necessary for growth.
